title: Adopt Cindy at the SPCA
description: GEORGE NEWS - Beautiful Cindy is waiting for...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Beautiful Cindy is waiting for her second chance. She’s been surrendered to the Garden Route SPCA, and still needs to find her forever home.


> This gentle three-year-old prefers quiet surroundings and has a calm, loving nature. She may seem a bit sad now, but with the right family, and plenty of love, her true spirit will shine.


Could you be the one to give Cindy the warm, loving home she deserves?

For more information about Cindy, or to adopt, please contact the SPCA on 044 878 1990.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
